title: Manual time tracking in mobile app
excerpt: For on site work, the mobile app is critical and currently there is no way to manually track time via the mobile app! When people are working on site, this is important because they are doing non-computer labor and canno…

posts.author: AbbyRDR (Abby Rajala)
posts.cookedHtml: For on site work, the mobile app is critical and currently there is no way to manually track time via the mobile app! When people are working on site, this is important because they are doing non-computer labor and cannot start and end a timer! And do not carry around a computer. Please add this feature!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s a great suggestion! Have you put it on the feature suggestion board? Feature requests - monday Community Forum
